name: data_engineering
trigger_condition: Task involves analytics, clickhouse, dbt, metrics, or dashboards
description: Data engineering skills: ClickHouse schema design, event emission, dbt models (staging, marts), metric definitions, dashboard queries, data lineage tracking, ETL/ELT pipelines, clickstream analysis.
expected_output: SQL/Python data pipelines, dbt models, ClickHouse schemas
known_limitations: ClickHouse client may not be installed; dbt requires profile config; dashboard changes require Metabase access
